query: I have an Obsidian vault with half a review-gated workflow in it and I honestly do not know what step to run first. Can you inspect the structure and tell me whether this is setup, compile, review, query, or maintenance work?
reason: Workflow-level ambiguity and lifecycle diagnosis.

query: I want an Obsidian living book for AI notes with draft/live separation and review gates, but I am not asking you to compile or query yet. Explain how the workflow hangs together and which step should start.
reason: Whole-workflow Obsidian vault request rather than one operation.

query: I am building a Karpathy-style LLM Wiki in Obsidian and before you do anything, tell me what lifecycle stage this vault is in and what should run next.
reason: Novice Karpathy-native wording that still needs workflow routing.

query: Set up a fresh Obsidian sub-vault as a review-gated knowledge base with raw, wiki, outputs/reviews, starter indices, and local guidance files.
reason: Explicit initialization request.

query: Please create an LLM Wiki / second brain in Obsidian for me with a Karpathy-style raw -> draft -> live workflow and the starter contract files.
reason: Novice onboarding wording should still land on kb-init.

query: Repair this partially initialized Obsidian vault before I ingest anything else. It has raw/, wiki/index.md, and wiki/log.md, but the support layer is obviously incomplete.
reason: Explicit repair of the support layer.

query: My vault still has raw, wiki, and outputs, but the local AGENTS.md contract file got deleted. Route me to the right repair step before anyone compiles or queries anything else.
reason: Missing AGENTS.md is a blocking contract repair.

query: This older Obsidian vault still uses wiki/summaries and wiki/concepts directly. Migrate it to the review-gated layout before we do anything else.
reason: Explicit legacy-layout migration.

query: Refresh raw/_manifest.yaml for this Obsidian vault before compile. I added a new raw article and want the source registry updated first.
reason: Explicit manifest refresh before compile.

query: Register these new raw assets and data files into the source manifest, but do not compile them yet.
reason: Explicit raw intake registration without draft generation.

query: Compile the new markdown notes I dropped under raw/human/articles and raw/agents/researcher into reviewable drafts without touching the raw files.
reason: Explicit compile pass from raw into drafts.

query: I dumped two markdown notes directly under raw/ in my Obsidian vault. Please sync the draft layer now and just warn me that CLAUDE.md is missing if needed.
reason: Root-level raw markdown compile edge case.

query: Refresh the draft layer because a raw article changed and one new capture has no summary yet. Do not promote anything to live.
reason: Incremental compile delta request.

query: Run the review gate on my Obsidian drafts now. Approve what is ready, reject what is weak, and only escalate the ambiguous cases.
reason: Explicit review gate request.

query: Lifecycle detection says needs-review. Please inspect the pending drafts, cited raw captures, and overlapping live pages, then decide what should persist.
reason: Direct needs-review trigger.

query: My approved live pages changed after the last briefing build. Rebuild the stale briefing without turning this into a normal query pass.
reason: Direct needs-briefing-refresh trigger.

query: What do my approved Obsidian notes already say about review gates? If the answer is substantive, archive it back into the vault.
reason: Grounded research query against the approved live layer.

query: Search the approved live wiki and topic pages for everything related to review gates, but just rank local candidates first.
reason: Canonical read-side lane now owns local-first retrieval as search mode.

query: Use kb-search to rank wiki/live, wiki/live/topics, briefings, and outputs/qa so I can see the best approved candidates before writing.
reason: Literal kb-search wording should now map to the canonical query skill.

query: Search the live wiki for everything related to local markdown search, reuse prior outputs/qa if they help, and give me a short grounded answer.
reason: Search and reuse prior durable answers.

query: Turn my approved live layer into a short X thread about why personal knowledge workflows should keep a review gate before query-time synthesis.
reason: Publish-mode artifact grounded in live knowledge.

query: Render a short Marp slide deck from my approved live notes about review gates and save it under outputs/slides.
reason: Deterministic slide rendering belongs to the dedicated render lane.

query: Use kb-render to turn the approved answer I already have into a report plus a canvas outline. I do not need a new grounded answer first.
reason: Explicit deterministic-render wording should map to the standalone kb-render skill.

query: Export my approved live knowledge as a static web wiki under outputs/web so I can browse it outside Obsidian.
reason: Static web export now belongs to kb-query web mode.

query: Run a weekly health check on this approved Obsidian vault. I care about stale Q&A, weak provenance, contradictions, and whether the live layer has started drifting.
reason: Explicit maintenance and health wording now routes to kb-review maintenance mode.

query: My archived answers have pending writeback candidates and I want the vault audited before I keep querying it.
reason: Writeback backlog is a maintenance signal handled by kb-review maintenance mode.

query: I know the live wiki exists, but before I ask another question I want you to audit stale Q&A, unresolved writeback backlog, and briefing drift across the approved layer.
reason: Maintenance-first near-miss against query wording should now route to kb-review maintenance mode.

query: This vault has a MEMORY.md with preferences and editorial priorities. Keep that outside the topic retrieval boundary and tell me what layer is still query truth.
reason: Query-time boundary clarification for approved live knowledge versus collaboration memory.

query: Lint the live wiki for render issues in tables, stale briefings, and approval drift. Apply only obvious mechanical fixes and leave judgment calls for humans.
reason: Maintenance workflow with safe mechanical fixes now belongs to kb-review.

query: My approved layer is structurally present, but the archived Q&A notes are older than the newer live concepts they cite. Audit drift first, not query.
reason: Maintenance-first due stale Q&A drift now routes to kb-review maintenance mode.

query: Check whether my creator style guides, MEMORY.md, and account briefings are drifting apart before I publish anything else.
reason: Creator consistency drift is a maintenance-mode governance concern.

query: Lifecycle detection says needs-review, and after that I want a short publishable summary. Handle the immediate safe next step first.
reason: Immediate gate should win over downstream publish intent.

query: Archive this answer back into my Obsidian vault after you ground it in the approved live notes. I want it reusable later instead of lost in chat.
reason: Direct archive-this-answer wording should map to the canonical query/archive lane.

query: Before you write another thread, check whether I already have an archived Q&A or archived article that covers this topic so we can reuse it instead of rewriting the same background.
reason: Archived artifact reuse should still route through kb-query.

query: Do not answer yet. Clean up the archive backlog first because old outputs still have pending writeback candidates and a few of them may now be stale relative to newer live pages.
reason: Archive hygiene and backlog cleanup belong to kb-review maintenance mode.

query: Explain why this Karpathy-style vault keeps raw sources retained in place instead of moving them into a raw/09-archive folder after compile.
reason: Archive-model clarification at the workflow level should route through the package entry skill.

query: This knowledge compiler vault needs both a local-first search pass and maybe a health audit, but first tell me the current stage and the safest next step.
reason: Mixed-intent novice wording should route through the package entry skill.

query: I dropped a new PDF into raw/papers/ and want it ingested into the Obsidian workflow. Do not assume it is already markdown.
reason: Paper PDFs are a companion-skill routing exception, not a normal shipped-skill trigger.

query: I am not asking you to compile or query yet. I want you to inspect this Obsidian vault workflow and tell me which lifecycle step should happen next because the structure and backlog signals look mixed.
reason: Router near-miss against overlapping operation keywords.

query: Help me design a vector retrieval service for SaaS documentation with embeddings, reranking, and a retrieval API. This is not an Obsidian vault.
reason: Search infrastructure design outside this bundle.

query: My Notion workspace needs a better tagging strategy for product notes. Should I rebuild the database or rely on relation properties?
reason: Not an Obsidian review-gated vault request.

query: Summarize this one article for me in plain English. I do not want to add it to any wiki, archive it, or maintain a vault.
reason: Standalone summarization request without vault intent.

query: Make a Mermaid architecture diagram for my backend service from the codebase. No Obsidian vault involved.
reason: Diagramming request outside bundle scope.

query: 先读 wiki/index.md，再帮我判断这个中文优先 LLM Wiki 现在该先补来源页、主题页、实体页，还是先做综合页。我不确定下一步是 compile、review 还是 query。
reason: Single-layer Chinese vocabulary with ambiguous next step should route through the package entry skill.

query: 帮我把这个 vault 搭成中文优先 wiki。我要的是 raw/wiki/output 这套脚手架，但可以接受你按现在仓库的 review-gated 方式落地，只要初始化和迁移一步到位。
reason: Single-layer onboarding wording with explicit setup intent should still land on kb-init.

query: raw/human/articles 里新放了一篇文章。请先按原文证据摘录整理成来源页，再把相关主题页和实体页草稿补出来，先不要进 live。
reason: Chinese source/topic/entity wording still means compile from raw into drafts first.

query: 别回答问题，先做一次中文优先 wiki 的 lint。我要看孤儿页、断链、旧结论被覆盖，还有 output/reports 里的治理报告。
reason: Chinese-LLM-Wiki lint and output/reports wording maps to review maintenance.

query: 基于已经批准的 live 层做一份综合页式分析，先放 output/analyses。回答前先读 wiki/index.md，尽量复用已有归档问答。
reason: Grounded analysis with output/analyses wording maps to query archive behavior.

query: 我不要新的 grounded answer，直接把已经批准的主题做成报告，输出到 output/reports，给团队周会用。
reason: Deterministic report generation from approved knowledge belongs to kb-render.

query: Set up Dataview queries in my Obsidian vault to list all tasks due this week. I just want a TODO view, no drafts or review gate needed.
reason: Dataview plugin task listing is not a review-gated KB lifecycle step.

query: Customize an Obsidian theme with CSS snippets so code blocks render better in dark mode. Pure styling, no vault workflow.
reason: Obsidian CSS theming is not a KB operation.

query: My Logseq graph is sprawling. Should I consolidate daily journals into topic pages, or keep using block references? Not using Obsidian.
reason: Logseq organization is outside this bundle.

query: Convert my Roam Research export into plain markdown while preserving block references. I am migrating off Roam to a plain folder.
reason: Roam export conversion is not a KB lifecycle operation.

query: Configure Zotero to auto-tag PDFs by research field using BetterBibTeX. I just want a cleaner library, no KB draft or review pipeline.
reason: Zotero library curation is outside this bundle.

query: Design Anki spaced repetition decks from my study notes with cloze deletions. No vault, no review gate, just SRS cards.
reason: Anki SRS deck design is not a KB workflow.

query: Build an Astro static site from my existing markdown blog folder and deploy to Vercel. Not an Obsidian vault and not a wiki export.
reason: Astro static site build is not kb-query web export.

query: Build a RAG pipeline with LangChain and Chroma for a set of product docs served to a customer support chatbot. Skip Obsidian entirely.
reason: Generic RAG pipeline is outside this bundle's query lane.

query: Set up a pgvector index with OpenAI embeddings for our internal docs search. No Obsidian, no markdown wiki.
reason: Vector index over docs is search infrastructure outside this bundle.

query: I want to index my personal markdown notes with ripgrep-all plus FZF so I can search them from the terminal. Not building a review-gated workflow.
reason: Terminal-side markdown search is not this bundle.

query: Configure husky pre-commit hooks to run lint and format on staged files. Just JS tooling, nothing to do with a wiki.
reason: git pre-commit hooks are unrelated to automation-hooks in this bundle.

query: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys my documentation site on every push to main. No Obsidian vault involved.
reason: CI workflow configuration is not a KB operation.

query: Use pandoc to batch-convert a folder of markdown posts into EPUB for an e-reader. No drafts, no review gate, no wiki.
reason: Pandoc format conversion is not a kb-render mode.

query: Sync Readwise highlights into Notion so my book notes stay searchable alongside product specs. Not an Obsidian vault request.
reason: Readwise-to-Notion sync is not a KB workflow in this bundle.
